calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Lillian Sing, Ret.; Reporter: Candace L. Yount; Clerk: Rani Edwards; Dept. 611-
Appearances: Susan Parkinson, Esq. for plaintiff Fendy Hardjojo; Raymond Harris, Defendant, in pro per.
This matter came on regularly from the Presiding Judge, Dept. 206 to place the terms of the agreement on the record. Ms. Parkinson, on behalf of the parties, placed a stipulation for judgment on the record as follows: Possession and restitution to the Plaintiff. Defendant will vacate the premises located at 93 - 6th Street, Apt. # 29, San Francisco at 5:00 p.m on or by August 2, 2005. Defendant will empty premises of all belongings and possessions; no illegal activities; and return key to the plaintiff. If Defendant complies, Plaintiff will waive all back rent and damages; defendant will waive security deposit and rental agreement will be forfeited. If defendant fails to comply, plaintiff may with 24 hour notice seek ex-parte judgment for the amount of $1,200.00 rent and damages. Ms. Parkinson will prepare and submit stipulation to this Court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SUSAN PARKINSON FOR PLAINTIFF FENDY HARDJOJO
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY MARY CLAUGUS FOR DEFENDANT RAYMOND HARRIS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS
